title: Fix #15243 Set AutomountServiceAccountToken to false
body:
podman does not use any service account token, so we set the automount flag
to false in podman generate kube.

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
LGTM, but the linter is complaining about a lack of `gofmt`

/approve
